item.title: Extra VNL ’25 Parts v26.05.1 ATS
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 30, 2026

Extra VNL ’25 Parts v26.05.1 ATS

This mod adds some extra parts to the 2025 Volvo VNL, primarily additional side deflector options for all sleeper cabins (440, 840, 860).
As a bonus, it also makes the sideskirt extensions removable for all sideskirts.

Added painted version of the Core Bumper
Removed “suitable_for[]” lines for oversize banner

Credits: PV Creations

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 30, 2026

Extra VNL ’25 Parts v26.05.1 ATS

This mod adds some extra parts to the 2025 Volvo VNL, primarily additional side deflector options for all sleeper cabins (440, 840, 860).
As a bonus, it also makes the sideskirt extensions removable for all sideskirts.

Added painted version of the Core Bumper
Removed “suitable_for[]” lines for oversize banner

Credits: PV Creations

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: MAN F2000 EVO by XBS v1.59 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 30, 2026

MAN F2000 EVO by XBS v1.59 ETS2

Changelog:
Small Maintenance Update… 4 new paint jobs added for the hooklift.

Update to Version 1.59
Many new features, paintable chassis, mirror guards, wind deflectors on the side windows, roll-off body + 2 containers and 4 skins (for now), new moving floor body, numerous bug fixes, guide poles as an accessory (Smalllight Addon)

Features:
The MAN F2000 Evo from XBS…
with some new additional features:
BDF + Rigid Suspension, 10×4 SLT with ballast body
4×2, 6xx, 8×4, 10×4 Semi-Trailer Trucks
2 Cabs
Engines from 360-1000 hp for heavy haulage
Extensive tuning options

Compatibility: 1.59

Credits: KieskutscherEF, XBS

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 30, 2026

MAN F2000 EVO by XBS v1.59 ETS2

Changelog:
Small Maintenance Update… 4 new paint jobs added for the hooklift.

Update to Version 1.59
Many new features, paintable chassis, mirror guards, wind deflectors on the side windows, roll-off body + 2 containers and 4 skins (for now), new moving floor body, numerous bug fixes, guide poles as an accessory (Smalllight Addon)

Features:
The MAN F2000 Evo from XBS…
with some new additional features:
BDF + Rigid Suspension, 10×4 SLT with ballast body
4×2, 6xx, 8×4, 10×4 Semi-Trailer Trucks
2 Cabs
Engines from 360-1000 hp for heavy haulage
Extensive tuning options

Compatibility: 1.59

Credits: KieskutscherEF, XBS

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Brewbuilt 379-378 v1.3 1.59 ATS
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 30, 2026

Brewbuilt 379-378 v1.3 1.59 ATS

Brewbuilt Peterbilt 379/378 V1.3 Change Log.
– Reworked/retextured all exhaust components
– Added customizable front fenders, polished, painted with polished gutter and chrome with painted gutter.
– Reworked OEM double square and shaved double square headlight’s.
– Added 359 single square headlights.
– Added bus glass black and light blue.
– Added gauge visors to both dashes.
– Added front fender steps onto the rear of the front fenders.
– Added hood latches.
– Added spot lights.
– Added shock boxes.
– Added purple, red and green cb options.
– Added shaved and “long options for front fender mounts.
– Added customizable hood trim to the center piece of the hood.
– Made front grill logo and hood ornament’s removeable.
– Added t-bar rear bumpers.
– Added new Hogebuilt 27,30 and 34 inch rear fenders.
– Added new Road Works front bumpers.
– Added new visors 10 inch RLK straight, RLK bandit and a custom visor.
– Reworked Shift mirror lights (now visible from the interior).
– Slightly reworked mirror antenna’s (more to follow in next update).
– Added “OG” 1952 and Grand General flying lady hood ornament’s.
– Reworked OEM hood emblem’s.

Description:
The BrewBuilt 379 is a highly popular and detailed custom truck mod for American Truck Simulator (ATS). Renowned for its extreme realism, it brings the classic long-nose 1987-2005 Peterbilt 379 into the game with deep customization and authentic mechanics.

Key features include:
Authentic Engine Configurations: Supports a wide variety of accurate engines and sound packs, including Caterpillar (C15, 3406E), Cummins (N14, ISX), and Detroit Diesel Series 60.
Ultra-Realistic Physics: Features heavy-haul physics, realistic weight distribution, and accurate gear shifting.
Deep Customization: Offers countless exterior and interior modifications, including bumper options, exhaust stacks, drop visors, light panels, and custom paint jobs.
Highly Detailed Interiors: Features fully animated, classic Peterbilt dashboard gauges, switches, and a 63″ sleeper option.

Credits: BRBuiit

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 30, 2026

Brewbuilt 379-378 v1.3 1.59 ATS

Brewbuilt Peterbilt 379/378 V1.3 Change Log.
– Reworked/retextured all exhaust components
– Added customizable front fenders, polished, painted with polished gutter and chrome with painted gutter.
– Reworked OEM double square and shaved double square headlight’s.
– Added 359 single square headlights.
– Added bus glass black and light blue.
– Added gauge visors to both dashes.
– Added front fender steps onto the rear of the front fenders.
– Added hood latches.
– Added spot lights.
– Added shock boxes.
– Added purple, red and green cb options.
– Added shaved and “long options for front fender mounts.
– Added customizable hood trim to the center piece of the hood.
– Made front grill logo and hood ornament’s removeable.
– Added t-bar rear bumpers.
– Added new Hogebuilt 27,30 and 34 inch rear fenders.
– Added new Road Works front bumpers.
– Added new visors 10 inch RLK straight, RLK bandit and a custom visor.
– Reworked Shift mirror lights (now visible from the interior).
– Slightly reworked mirror antenna’s (more to follow in next update).
– Added “OG” 1952 and Grand General flying lady hood ornament’s.
– Reworked OEM hood emblem’s.

Description:
The BrewBuilt 379 is a highly popular and detailed custom truck mod for American Truck Simulator (ATS). Renowned for its extreme realism, it brings the classic long-nose 1987-2005 Peterbilt 379 into the game with deep customization and authentic mechanics.

Key features include:
Authentic Engine Configurations: Supports a wide variety of accurate engines and sound packs, including Caterpillar (C15, 3406E), Cummins (N14, ISX), and Detroit Diesel Series 60.
Ultra-Realistic Physics: Features heavy-haul physics, realistic weight distribution, and accurate gear shifting.
Deep Customization: Offers countless exterior and interior modifications, including bumper options, exhaust stacks, drop visors, light panels, and custom paint jobs.
Highly Detailed Interiors: Features fully animated, classic Peterbilt dashboard gauges, switches, and a 63″ sleeper option.

Credits: BRBuiit

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Real Company Logo v3.3 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 30, 2026

Real Company Logo v3.3 ETS2

Mod updated for patch 1.59
– Skanfill gas station (Sweden) replaced with Ingo
– TQG gas station (Finland, Sweden, Norway) replaced with St1
– TQG gas station (Denmark) replaced with Q8 – Replaced Finoil gas station (Finland) with Teboil
– Fixed bugs Real company logo (addon for SCS Map) should be enabled in the mod manager above the main mod

Credits: SCS, satan19990, Schumi, jasper99, rookie_one.

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 30, 2026

Real Company Logo v3.3 ETS2

Mod updated for patch 1.59
– Skanfill gas station (Sweden) replaced with Ingo
– TQG gas station (Finland, Sweden, Norway) replaced with St1
– TQG gas station (Denmark) replaced with Q8 – Replaced Finoil gas station (Finland) with Teboil
– Fixed bugs Real company logo (addon for SCS Map) should be enabled in the mod manager above the main mod

Credits: SCS, satan19990, Schumi, jasper99, rookie_one.

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

item.title: Scania R450 Weeda Penoza v1.0 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 30, 2026

Scania R450 Weeda Penoza v1.0 ETS2

Game : Euro Truck Simulator 2
Mod Name : Scania R450 Weeda Penoza
Game Version : [1.58 – 1.59]

1 Cabin
1 Chassis
HQ İnterior (HİGH Detailed)
Texture HQ
Neon Light

Credits: PDT

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
